creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
#1:  same patch against current, snort 2.9.2.1. Sorry I didn't check to see if it was out yet.
#2, that stubborn u2boat README just won't go away. with your Makefile, it's stull there. (yes, I say stubborn, since I 
tried for an hour with various patches to Makefile.am, Makefile.in, Makefile in u2boat dir, gave up)
this didn't work:
	@${REINPLACE_CMD} '/install-data-am: /s/install-dist_docDATA//' \
		${WRKSRC}/tools/u2boat/Makefile.in

let me know if you want me to test anything other than that.
Other suggestion just give up and pkg-plist the README. 

=== Checking filesystem state after all packages deleted
1975 	================================================================
1976 	list of extra files and directories in / (not present on clean system but present after everything was deinstalled)
1977 	5033879 8 drwxr-xr-x 2 root wheel 512 Jan 21 11:11 usr/local/share/doc/snort
1978 	5033885 8 -r--r--r-- 1 root wheel 562 Jan 21 11:11 usr/local/share/doc/snort/README.u2boat
#3, to make it easy to test the SNORT_OPTIONS, I have applied it against your current makefile.

-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
SECNAP Network Security Corporation
(561) 999-5000 scheidell@secnap.net
http://www.secnap.com/
